app.name: VORTEX
app.welcomeHint: Khetha igumbi okanye wenze elitsha. Unxibelelwano lusebenza ngaphandle kwe-intanethi — uthungelwano lwendawo kuphela.
app.welcomeSub: Khetha igumbi okanye wenze elitsha. Unxibelelwano lusebenza ngaphandle kwe-intanethi — uthungelwano lwendawo kuphela.

auth.keyNotFound: Isitshixo sabucala sale akhawunti asifunyenwanga. Ngena ngephasiwedi.
auth.subtitle: Umthumeli-myalezo P2P ongenasikhungo
auth.keyExpiredEnterPassword: Isitshixo siphelelwe lixesha. Ngenisa igama lokugqithisa lika-@{username}:
auth.confirmRemoveAccount: Susa iakhawunti kuluhlu? I-akhawunti ngokwayo ayisayi kucinywa.
auth.enterUsernameAndSeed: Ngenisa igama lomsebenzisi kunye nebinzana lembewu
auth.seedPhraseMustBe24Words: Ibinzana lembewu kufuneka libe namagama angama-24
auth.seedPhraseWarning: Gcina la magama angama-24! Ziboniswa KUNYE kuphela.
auth.seedPhraseHint: Ukuba uyalibala igama eliyimfihlo, eli binzana kuphela kwendlela yokubuyisela iakhawunti yakho. Yibhale phantsi ephepheni kwaye uyigcine kwindawo ekhuselekileyo.

rooms.emptyHint: Akukho magumbi — yenza okanye joyina elinye

chat.notDelivered: Umyalezo awuzange uhanjiswe. Jonga uqhagamshelwano lwakho.
chat.keyUpdated: Isitshixo segumbi sihlaziyiwe. Silindele isitshixo esitsha...
chat.encryptedTooltip: Umbhalo ontsonkothileyo (E2E). Uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo luyenziwa kwicala lomxhasi.

settings.title: Iisethingi
settings.name: Igama
settings.geoFailed: Yehluleka ukuqinisekisa indawo. Jonga ukuba i-GPS/Wi-Fi iyasebenza.
settings.geoTimeout: Ixesha lokufumana indawo liphelelwe. Zama endaweni evulekileyo.
settings.speaker: Isithethi
settings.ttlPrompt: Zingaphi iintsuku zokungasebenzi kufuneka i-akhawunti icinywe?
settings.sqQuestion1: Ingaba lalisithini igama lwesilwanyana sakho sasekhaya sokuqala?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Ukuba uyalibala igama eliyimfihlo, ungaphinda ufikelele ngokuphendula imibuzo emi-3. Ungasebenzisa eyakho imibuzo okanye emiselweyo.
settings.sqFillAll: Nceda ugcwalise yonke imibuzo kunye neempendulo
settings.pwReminderDesc: Ukutshekishwa kwenyanga - qiniseka ukuba uyakhumbula igama lakho lokungena.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Sincoma ukuhlaziya igama lokugqithisa lakho ngelixa ungenile, ukuze ungaphulukani nofikelelo.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Cima i-cache yemidiya kunye nedatha yethutyana?

Izitshixo zoguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo kunye noseto AYISAYI kucinywa.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Iseshoni kufuneka isebenze ubuncinane iintsuku ezisi-7 ukutshintsha igama lokugqitha.

Ixesha eliseleyo: {daysLeft} iintsuku.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Iintsuku ezisi-7 azikadluli. Nceda ulinde {daysLeft} iintsuku ezingakumbi.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Ufikelelo lokuma komhlaba lwaliwe.

1. macOS: Iisetingi zeNkqubo → Yabucala → Iinkonzo zeNdawo → vula umkhangeli zincwadi
2. Isikhangeli: cofa i icon yokutshixa kwibar yedilesi → Indawo → Vumela
3. Phinda ulayishe iphepha
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Ufikelelo lokuma komhlaba lwaliwe.

Cofa i icon yokutshixa kwibar yedilesi → Indawo → Vumela, emva koko ulayishe kwakhona iphepha

call.groupCallNotice: Umnxeba weqela — onke amalungu egumbi aya kufumana isimemo

bots.installSuccess: I-bot ifakiwe! Yongeze egumbini kusuka kwizicwangciso zegumbi.

bots.regenerateTokenConfirm: Hlaziya ithokheni? Umqondiso omdala uya kuyeka ukusebenza.
bots.noBotsCreateHint: Awunazo iibhothi. Yenza ibhot kwiiSetingi → iiBots

panic.callSettingsNote: Qaphela: Iindlela ze-Force TCP ne-Relay zinokwandisa ukucotha kodwa zinika ubumfihlo obukhulu. Ukufihla ithrafikhi kongeza imbumba engahleliwe kwimisebenzo ye-SDP.
panic.desc: Yonke idatha kweli node iyosuswa ngonaphakade. Esi senzo asinakuguqulelwa.
panic.warningBody:
Umalunga noku utshabalalisa ngokupheleleyo yonke idatha.
Esi senzo asinakungenziwa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Yonke imikhondo isusiwe. Le seshini iphelile.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Xa isitshixo esitsha segumbi sifika — thumela ngokuzenzekelayo kuzo zonke izixhobo zakho (E2E efihliwe)
privacy.backupHint: Fihla zonke izitshixo ngegama eligcinwe futhi londoloza kwiseva. Ngotshintsho lwesixhobo — buyisela ngegama elinye.
privacy.crossSignHint: Qinisekisa izixhobo ezitsha ngokuzenzekelayo ngesiginesha se-HMAC (ukuzikhusela kwimiguqulelo)
privacy.federatedHint: Saba izicucu zesahlulo ezifihliwe kwi-nodes ze-federation. Naxa iseva ilahlekile — buyisela ngabahlobo.
privacy.historySyncHint: Ikhophi yemiyalezo efihliwe iyafumaneka kuzo zonke izixhobo. Iseva ibona isithonga kuphela
privacy.ktHint: Irekhodi lokongeza kuphela lawo wonke utshintsho lwesitshixo somphakathi noxande we-hash (Merkle). Iseva iyasayina inguma nganye — ubuxoki buye bafumaneke ngexesha lohlolo.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Dlulisela izitshixo kwisixhobo esitsha ngekhodi yenombolo ezi-6. Izitshixo zifihliwe nge-ECIES — iseva ayikwazi ukuzifunda.
privacy.ssssHint: Hlukanisa isitshixo esiyinhloko izingxenye ezinge-N. Izingxenye ezinge-M ziyobuyisela isitshixo. Ingxenye nganye ifihliwe nomxholo othembekileyo othile (ECIES). Iseva ibona ama-blobs afihliwe kuphela.
privacy.title: Ubumfihlo

contactSync.title: Fumana abafowunelwa bakho
contactSync.desc: Jonga ukuba ngabaphi abafowunelwa befowuni yakho abasele bekwiVortex. Iinombolo zefowuni ziyakhawuleza — umncedisi akaze azibone.

errors.noMiniAppUrl: Akukho Mini App URL elungiselelwe le bot.

ide.simulatorHint: Bhala Gravitix ikhowudi kwaye uvavanye ibhot yakho apha ngexesha lokwenyani.
ide.noBotsYet:
Azikho iibhothi ezigciniweyo okwangoku.
Yongeza ithokheni kwiprojekthi esele ikhona kuqala.
ide.noBotTokenAlert:
Le projekthi ayinaseti yeBot Token.
Hlela iprojekthi kwaye wongeze ithokheni yakho ye-bot Telegram kuqala.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Ibinzana logqitho kufuneka libe noonobumba abasi-8 ubuncinane
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Faka le khowudi kwisixhobo sakho esingundoqo
keyBackup.minTwoContacts: Ubuncinane aba-2 abafowunelwa abathembekileyo kunye nomda ≥ 2
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Ngenisa ibinzana lokugqithisa ukwenzela uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo. Khumbula - ukubuyisela ngaphandle akunakwenzeka.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Ngenisa ibinzana lokugqithisa olisebenzisileyo xa usenza ugcino.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Cima i-backup yesitshixo? Esi senzo asinakuguqulwa.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Urhoxisa zonke izabelo eziphambili? Ukubuyisela ngokusebenzisa abafowunelwa abathembekileyo kuya kuba yinto engenakwenzeka.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Inkosi yakho yesitshixo iya kwahlulwa ibe zizabelo ze-N usebenzisa i-Shamir scheme. Naziphi na izabelo ze-M ziya kuvumela ukubuyiswa okungundoqo. Isabelo ngasinye siguqulelwe ngokuntsonkothileyo kumfowunelwa othile omthembileyo.
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Ubuncinci abalingane aba-2 abasebenzayo kunye noguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo olufunekayo
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Cima ugcino olumanyeneyo? Ishadi koontanga ziya kuhlala, kodwa imetadata iya kulahleka.

upload.csrfNotFound: Umqondiso weCSRF awufunyenwanga — nceda uhlaziye iphepha.

pageBuilder.dropHint: Tsala iifayile apha okanye ucofe ukukhetha

botConstructor.title: IBot umakhi
botConstructor.subtitle: Yakha ibhot yakho ngokubonakalayo - akukho khowudi ifunekayo
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Umyalezo owamkelekileyo xa umsebenzisi eqala ibhot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Wamkelekile! Ndiyibhot yakho. Sebenzisa /nceda ukubona imiyalelo.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Iphendula xa umsebenzisi ethumela umyalelo othile (umzekelo / uncedo, /qala). Unokongeza amanyathelo encoko ukwenza iincoko zamanyathelo amaninzi.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Iphendula xa umyalezo womsebenzisi udibana nepateni. Isebenzisa i-regex — umz. "molo|hi" ihambelana namagama omabini. Akukho tyala.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Abasebenzisi bomyalezo wokuqala babona xa beqala i-bot nge/start. Yonke ibhot kufuneka ibe nenye.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Uthumela umyalezo ngokuzenzekelayo kwishedyuli. Ilungele izikhumbuzo zemihla ngemihla, idigesti yeveki, okanye izibhengezo zamaxesha ngamaxesha.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Amasebe ingqiqo yebhot. Jonga igalelo eliguquguqukayo okanye lomsebenzisi kwaye uphendule ngokwahlukileyo ngokusekelwe kwisiphumo.
botConstructor.docsRandom: I-Bot ikhetha impendulo enye ngokungenamkhethe kuluhlu. Ilungele iziqhulo, iingcebiso, imibuliso, okanye iimpendulo ezahlukahlukeneyo.
botConstructor.docsApi: Yenza isicelo se-HTTP kwi-API yangaphandle kwaye isebenzisa impendulo kumyalezo we-bot. Sebenzisa {data.field} kwiindawo zempendulo zesalathiso.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Ithumela isaziso kumphathi wegumbi xa isenziwa. Iluncedo kwizilumkiso, izaziso zabasebenzisi abatsha, okanye ukumodareyitha.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Yongeza amanyathelo kwibhloko yoMyalelo ukwenza iingxoxo ezisebenzisanayo. Inyathelo ngalinye libuza umbuzo, lilindele impendulo yomsebenzisi, kwaye liyigcine kwinto eguquguqukayo. Sebenzisa izinto ezahlukeneyo kwimpendulo yokugqibela nge-{variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Sebenzisa iibrayisi ezigobileyo {variable} kwisicatshulwa sokuphendula ukufaka amaxabiso aguqukayo. Iinguqu zelizwe ziyaqhubeka kuyo yonke imiyalezo.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Uguqulo olwakhelwe ngaphakathi lufumaneka kwimpendulo nganye:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Qala ngebhloko eyamkelekileyo - yinto yokuqala abayibonayo abasebenzisi
botConstructor.docsTip2: Yongeza i/help umyalelo odwelisa yonke imiyalelo ekhoyo
botConstructor.docsTip3: Sebenzisa amanyathelo encoko kubhaliso, uphando, okanye ukuqokelelwa kwedatha
botConstructor.docsTip4: Dibanisa iibhloko Condition kunye variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Vavanya ibhot yakho ngokuthetha nayo kwigumbi emva kokuthunyelwa

gravitixDocs.title: Isalathiso soLwimi lweGravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Ulwimi lweskripthi olukumgangatho ophezulu wokwakha iibhothi. 96 iimpawu. Umhlwa ngasemva.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: I-Gravitix yi-domain-specific language (DSL) eyenzelwe ukusuka phantsi ukuze ibhale i-Vortex bots. Apho ezinye iilwimi zifuna amathala eencwadi, ii-callbacks, kunye ne-boilerplate, i-Gravitix ikunika abaphathi beminyhadala abakwiklasi yokuqala, ukuhamba kwencoko, kunye nemeko eyakhelwe-ngaphakathi-zonke zicocekile, zifundeka kwisintaksi ephefumlelwe nguRust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Iyafundeka — ikhowudi ifundeka njengenjongo, hayi oomatshini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Ikhuselekile — iintlobo ezimileyo zokubamba iimpazamo phambi kwexesha lokusebenza
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: I-Expressive - ukuhamba, oonogada, kunye nokulinganisa ipateni yakhelwe ngaphakathi
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal - akukho iiklasi, akukho ilifa, akukho sikhokelo ukufunda
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: IGravitix yeyaye nabani na ofuna ukwakha iVortex bot ngokukhawuleza - nokuba awuzange ubhale ikhowudi ngaphambili, okanye ungumphuhlisi onamava odiniweyo yiPython boilerplate. Le ngcaciso ifundisa iGravitix kwimigaqo yokuqala: akukho mava angaphambili afunekayo.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Icandelo ngalinye lakha kulawo angaphambili. Ukuba umtsha kwiprogramu, funda ukusuka phezulu ukuya ezantsi. Ukuba sele usazi olunye ulwimi, sebenzisa uluhlu lweziqulatho ukutsibela ngqo kwizinto onomdla kuzo.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Eyona ndlela ikhawulezayo ukusuka kwiqanda ukuya kwibhot esebenzayo.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: kwi/qalisa {... } — ichaza isibambi esisebenza xa umsebenzisi ethumela /qalisa. khupha "..." - ithumela umyalezo kumsebenzisi. {ctx.first_name} — idibanisa igama lokuqala lomsebenzisi kumtya.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Kwi-IDE yeGravitix, cofa iqhosha elithi Qhuba kwibar ephezulu. Ngenisa i-Vortex Bot Token yakho xa ucelwa. I-bot iqala ngokukhawuleza - akukho nyathelo lokwakha elifunekayo.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Yonke inkqubo yeGravitix yakhiwe kwiibhloko ezintathu zokwakha ezisisiseko: abaphathi, iingxelo ezikhuphayo, kunye nengqiqo.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Ixabiso ngalinye kwiGravitix linohlobo. Uhlobo lwenkqubo lumile: iindidi zikhangelwa ngexesha lokuqokelela, phambi kokuba ibhot yakho ibaleke.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Abaqhubi badibanisa amaxabiso ukuvelisa amaxabiso amatsha.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Imitya kwiGravitix ibhalwe ngekhowudi ye-UTF-8. Baxhasa i-interpolation etyebileyo kunye ne-suite yemisebenzi eyakhelweyo.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Ipateni-thelekisa ixabiso ngokuchasene neepateni ezininzi. Yicinge njengengxelo yokutshintsha enamandla.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Imisebenzi ziibhloko zekhowudi ezinokuphinda zisetyenziswe. Bakunceda ukuba uphephe ukuphindaphinda kwaye wenze ikhowudi iqondeke lula.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Abaphangi yintliziyo ye-Gravitix bot. Umphathi ngamnye umamela uhlobo oluthile lomsitho kwaye aqhube xa eso siganeko sisenzeka.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Abalindi bakuvumela ukuba wongeze imeko kumphathi. Umphathi ubaleka kuphela ukuba unogada uvavanya ukuba yinyani.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Into ye-ctx ifumaneka ngokuzenzekelayo ngaphakathi kuyo yonke impatho. Iqulethe ulwazi malunga nomyalezo wangoku kunye nomsebenzisi owuthumeleyo.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: I-State ivumela i-bot yakho ikhumbule izinto phakathi kwemiyalezo. Ngaphandle kwelizwe, wonke umyalezo uzimele kwaye i-bot ayinayo inkumbulo.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Ukuqukuqela kukuvumela ukuba ubhale incoko enamanyathelo amaninzi ngendlela elandelelanayo, efundekayo. Ukuqukuqela kunokunqumama kwaye ulinde umyalezo olandelayo womsebenzisi.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Qhuba ikhowudi ngokuzenzekelayo kwishedyuli - akukho misebenzi yecron, akukho nkonzo zangaphandle ezifunekayo.
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Umsebenzisi wombhobho |> ugqithisa ixabiso njengengxabano yokuqala kumsebenzi olandelayo. Yenza imisebenzi yekhonkco ifundeke, ukusuka ekhohlo ukuya ekunene.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: I-Gravitix ibonelela ngokuphathwa kwempazamo ecwangcisiweyo kunye ne-try / catch / ekugqibeleni iibhloko.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Izakhelo zikuvumela ukuba uqokelele idatha ehambelanayo phantsi kodidi olunegama. I-Enums ichaza isethi evaliweyo yokwahluka.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: I-Gravitix ithumela ithala leencwadi lezibalo elibanzi elinemisebenzi eyi ~180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: I-Gravitix inohlobo oluntsonkothileyo lwendalo - iperi ye-64-bit floats emele iindawo zokwenyani kunye neengcamango.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: I-Gravitix ibandakanya i-calculus yamanani: i-derivatives kunye ne-integrated computed kwimisebenzi engafanelekanga.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Umgca wealgebra yimathematika yeevekhtha kunye nematriki.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Ithiyori yamanani iphonononga iimpawu zee-integers. Isiseko se-cryptography yanamhlanje.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Izibalo zibonelela ngezixhobo zokuchaza, ukuhlalutya, kunye nokwenza izigqibo kwidatha.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Imisebenzi ekhethekileyo zizisombululo kwii-equations ezibalulekileyo zokwahlula.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Uguqulo lweFourier lubolisa umqondiso kwiifrikhwekhwethe zayo.
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Eyona ndlela ilungileyo yokufunda iGravitix kukwakha. Qala nge-echo bot elula, emva koko wongeze i-state, uze udibanise ukuhamba. Ingqiqo nganye entsha oyifundayo ivula amathuba amaninzi.

bestpractices.p1: Iipateni kunye nemikhwa eyenza ukuba ii-bots zakho Gravitix zithembeke ngakumbi, zifundeke, kwaye zilondolozeke.
bestpractices.p2: Yonke ibhot kufuneka ibene-backback on msg isiphathi ukuze abasebenzisi bahlale befumana impendulo:
bestpractices.p3: Ungaze ucinge ukuba into ethunyelwe ngumsebenzisi iyasebenza:
bestpractices.p4: Gcina abaphangi bemfutshane. Hambisa ingqiqo entsonkothileyo kwimisebenzi enegama:
bestpractices.p5: Ngalo lonke ixesha guard destruct imisebenzi:
bestpractices.p6: Eyona ndlela ingcono yokufunda Gravitix kukwakha. Qala nge-simple echo bot, emva koko udibanise state, uze udibanise flows. Ingqiqo nganye entsha oyifundayo ivula amathuba amaninzi.

bitwise.p1: Abasebenzisi be-Bitwise basebenza ngokuthe ngqo kumboniso wokubini weenombolo ezipheleleyo. Inani elipheleleyo liyi-64-bit yexabiso esayiniweyo; bitwise ops uyiphatha njengolandelelwano lweebits ezingama-64.

builtins.cc5: print/log yamkela naliphi na inani leengxoxo zalo naluphi na uhlobo:
builtins.p1: Gravitix ibandakanya ithala leencwadi elisemgangathweni. Yonke imisebenzi eyakhelwe-ngaphakathi ihlala ikhona - akukho mpahla ifunekayo.
builtins.p2: Udwelisa indlela yenkxaso-yokufowuna isivakalisi ukongeza kwimisebenzi ezimeleyo:
builtins.p3: Funda amaxabiso kwindawo OS — iluncedo kwiimfihlo ezifana API nezitshixo:
builtins.p4: Sukubhala API izitshixo okanye iithokheni ngqo kwifayile yakho .grav. Sebenzisa env("KEY_NAME") kwaye usete ukuguquguquka kwindawo yakho yokuthunyelwa.
builtins.p5: Le misebenzi iprinta kwikhonsoli yomncedisi — ayibonakali kubasebenzisi, iluncedo ngexesha lophuhliso:
builtins.td10: Khangela ukuba umtya osezantsi ukhona na
builtins.td29: Guqulela kwinani elipheleleyo (i-truncates float, ipase str)
builtins.td34: Umtya wephedi esekhohlo kububanzi obunikiweyo (itshili yephedi emiselweyo sisithuba)
builtins.td56: Ixesha langoku njengesitampu sexesha se Unix (imizuzwana)
builtins.td57: Ixesha langoku njengentambo efundeka ngumntu UTC

complex_type.cc6: Ifom yePolar: bonisa u-z ngobukhulu kunye ne-engile
complex_type.li5: Amandla: z**n usebenzisa ifomula kaDe Moivre kwinani elipheleleyo n
complex_type.p1: Inombolo entsonkothileyo inohlobo a + bi, apho a iyinxalenye yokwenyani kwaye b yinxalenye yentelekelelo. i yiyunithi yentelekelelo echazwa ngu-i² = −1. Amanani antsonkothileyo andisa umgca wokwenyani kwinqwelomoya, evumela izisombululo kwii-equations ezifana x² + 1 = 0 ezingenampendulo yokwenyani.
complex_type.p2: Ku-Gravitix ubhala amagama entelekelelo ngesimamva esithi i:
complex_type.p3: Yonke imisebenzi emine esisiseko isebenza kumaxabiso antsonkothileyo ngokuthe ngqo. Gravitix ilandela imigaqo yezibalo entsonkothileyo eqhelekileyo:
complex_type.p4: Ukusetyenzwa komqondiso (uhlalutyo oluvakalayo, FFT), ukuveliswa kwe-fractal (iseti yeMandelbrot), ukulinganisa kwefiziksi, ukubala kombane, kunye ne-quantum computing zonke zifuna i-arithmetic enzima. Gravitix ikuvumela ukuba ubale ezi zibalo kanye ngaphakathi kwe-Vortex bot ngaphandle kwamathala eencwadi angaphandle.
complex_type.td14: Ukusuka kwimo yencam yomhlaba: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td24: Imisebenzi ye-Trig yandisiwe ukuya kwinqwelomoya enzima

emit.p1: Thumela umyalezo kuye nawuphi na umsebenzisi ngokuthi ID (uluncedo kwimisebenzi ecwangcisiweyo okanye kusasazo lolawulo):

error.p1: Songa nayiphi na ikhowudi enokusilela kwibhloko try. Ukuba impazamo ithi thrown — mhlawumbi ngo-Gravitix ixesha lokubaleka okanye ngokucacileyo ngekhowudi yakho — execution itsibela kwibhloko catch. Ixabiso elibanjiweyo libotshelelwa kuguquko oluthiye emva kokuba catch.
error.p2: finally ibaleka ngaphandle kwemiqathango — nokuba try iphumelele okanye catch iphethe impazamo. Yisebenzise ukukhulula izixhobo, ukungena, okanye ukuthumela umyalezo wokugqiba.
error.p3: Sebenzisa imposiso yokuphatha imisebenzi exhomekeke kwigalelo langaphandle: ukwahlula umbhalo womsebenzisi, ukufowunela ii-APIs, izinto eziguquguqukayo zemekobume yokufunda, okanye ukwenza izibalo ezintsonkothileyo apho iimpazamo zesizinda (sqrt of negative, log of zero) zinokwenzeka. Ngeempazamo zengqiqo zangaphakathi, khetha guard amagatya nakwangoko returns.

examples.p1: I-bots epheleleyo, esebenzayo ebonisa iipateni eziqhelekileyo.
examples.p2: Eyona simpleyona iluncedo ibhot — iphinda every into ethethwa ngumsebenzisi.
examples.p3: I-simple bot ebala ukucofa amaqhosha ngomsebenzisi ngamnye.

flows.cc1: Ixhoma apha, iphinda iqale xa umsebenzisi ephendula
flows.cc2: wait kuwo nawuphi na umyalezo obhaliweyo
flows.p2: wait ixhoma ekhoyo flow de kwenzeke isiganeko esikhankanyiweyo. Ixabiso lomsitho returned:
flows.p3: Xa i-flow ibetha wait, igcina zonke iinguqu zayo zasekhaya kunye nokunqumamisa. Xa umsebenzisi ethumela umyalezo olandelayo, i-flow iphinda iqale kanye apho ibiyeke khona. Oku kwenzeka elubala-ubhala nje ikhowudi yomgama.

functions.cc1: iminxeba bulisa, hayi return ixabiso elisetyenzisiweyo
functions.p3: Xela return uhlobo emva -> kwaye usebenzise return:
functions.p4: Sebenzisa izibiyeli ze-engile kwiintlobo eziqhelekileyo kwiiparamitha:
functions.p5: Umsebenzi unokuwubiza self (ngokukhathala ukuya ku-void ukuphindaphinda okungapheliyo):
functions.p6: Ixesha lokuqhuba linyanzelisa ubunzulu bomnxeba obona buninzi (oqhele ukuba ngama-200) ukunqanda ukupakisha okungaphayaflows.

guard.p1: Ukuba umsebenzisi akangomlawuli, umqhubi wokuqala guard akaphumeleli, aze Gravitix awele kumphathi wesibini.
guard.p2: Soloko ubonelela ngesibambi sokubuyela umva ngaphandle guard ukusingatha ityala xa zonke guarded iziphatho zitsityiwe. Oku kuqinisekisa ukuba abasebenzisi bahlala befumana impendulo.

handlers.cc1: Oku kuqhuba kuyo yonke eminye imiyalezo ebhaliweyo
handlers.cc2: ctx.umbhalo we /echo molo hlabathi → "/echo molo hlabathi"
handlers.cc3: Hlanganisa kwakhona every into emva komyalelo
handlers.p1: Vortex imiyalelo iqala ngo /. Match nabo nge:
handlers.p2: Ibaleka nawuphi na umyalezo obhaliweyo ongenanto (hayi umyalelo):
handlers.p3: Ungachaza abaphathi abaninzi njengoko ufuna. Baziqhuba ngokuzimeleyo:
handlers.p4: Imiyalelo inokubandakanya iingxoxo. Umyalezo opheleleyo (umyalelo + args) uyafumaneka nge ctx.text:
handlers.p5: Xa abaphathi abaninzi benokuthi match, batshekishwa ngendlela ebhalwe ngayo. Eyokuqala match iphumelele. Isiphathi on msg sihlala siqhelekile njengokubuyisela umva.
handlers.td10: Wonke umnyhadala, nokuba loluphi na uhlobo — catch-konke ukubuya umva

if.p1: Ukuphunyezwa okunemiqathango: sebenzisa ikhowudi eyahlukileyo ngokuxhomekeke kwimeko.
if.p2: Sebenzisa elif kumasebe amaninzi. Kuphela isebe lokuqala matching eliqhuba:
if.p3: Ukuzalela nzulu kwenza ikhowudi ifundeke nzima. Ukhetha return kwangethuba ukuthambisa amasebe:
if.p4: Nayiphi na intetho evavanya ukuba bool isebenza njengemeko:

intro.li2: Safe — iindidi ezimileyo catch iimpazamo phambi kwexesha lokusebenza
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, kunye nepateni matching zakhiwe ngaphakathi
intro.li4: Minimal — akukho ziklasi, akukho lifa, akukho zikhokelo zokufunda
intro.p1: Gravitix lulwimi oluthe ngqo kwisizinda (DSL) oluyilwe ukusuka phantsi ukuya phezulu ukuze lubhalwe Vortex bots. Apho ezinye iilwimi zifuna amathala eencwadi, ii-callbacks, kunye ne-boilerplate, Gravitix ikunika abaphathi beminyhadala abakumgangatho wokuqala, incoko flows, kunye ne-built-in state — zonke zikwisintaksi ecocekileyo, efundekayo ephefumlelwe ngu-Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix yeyakhe nabani na ofuna ukwakha i-bot Vortex ngokukhawuleza - nokuba awuzange uyibhale ikhowudi ngaphambili, okanye ungumphuhlisi onamava odiniweyo Python yiboilerplate. Le referensi ifundisa Gravitix ukusuka kwimigaqo yokuqala: akukho mava angaphambili afunekayo.
intro.p3: Icandelo ngalinye lakha kulawo angaphambili. Ukuba umtsha kwiprogramu, funda ukusuka phezulu ukuya ezantsi. Ukuba sele usazi olunye ulwimi, sebenzisa uluhlu lweziqulatho ukutsibela ngqo kwizinto onomdla kuzo.
intro.p4: Kuyo yonke le ngxelo, u-→ uthetha "uvavanya ukuya" okanye "ukuvelisa", kwaye // ... ubonisa amagqabantshintshi angahoywayo ngumqokeleli.

loops.p3: Qinisekisa ukuba imeko ekugqibeleni iba false, okanye sebenzisa break ukuphuma. Ixesha lokubaleka likhusela kwiilophu ezingenasiphelo ngokwenene ezinomda wenyathelo.
loops.p4: Phinda ufunde ngaphezulu every into kuluhlu:

match.p1: _ li wildcard — match yenza nantoni na engazange match ingalo zangaphambili.
match.p3: Sebenzisa ibhloko { ... } xa ufuna ngaphezu kwesinye statement:

math_calculus.cc10: Ummandla wesangqa onerediyasi 1: kufuneka ibe π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Ixabiso elilindelekileyo: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx ngaphezu konikezelo oluqhelekileyo
math_calculus.cc14: Uthotho lweTaylor ye^x malunga no x=0: 1 + x + x²/2! + x³/3! +...
math_calculus.cc16: Inyathelo lendlela kaNewton: x₁ = x₀ − f(x₀)/f'(x₀)
math_calculus.p1: I-derivative f'(x) ilinganisa ukuba u-f utshintsha ngokukhawuleza kangakanani na kwindawo x. I-geometrically yi-slope yomgca we-tangent. Gravitix isebenzisa umahluko osembindini kwizinto zokuqala eziphuma kuyo (imposiso O(h²)) kunye ifomula yokulandelelana kwesibini kwimveliso yesibini.
math_calculus.p2: I-integral ∫f(x)dx ukusuka ku-a ukuya ku-b yindawo ephantsi kwegophe. Gravitix ibonelela ngeendlela ezintathu ngokuchaneka okukhulayo:
math_calculus.td17: Ushwankathelo Σ f(k) ukwenzela k = ukusuka..ukuya
math_calculus.td18: Imveliso Π f(k) ye k = ukusuka..ukuya

math_complex.cc4: Iingcambu zomanyano: n-th iingcambu zika-1 are e^(2πik/n) ye k=0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: I-Möbius inguqu yemephu izangqa/imigca ukuya kwizangqa/imigca
math_complex.li2: Ingxoxo arg(z) = atan2(b, a) — i-engile esuka kwi-positive real axis
math_complex.p1: Inani ngalinye elintsonkothileyo z = a + bi linokubonwa njengenqaku (a, b) kwi-Argand plane. I-axis ethe tye yi-axis yokwenyani, i-axis ethe nkqo yi-imaginary axis.
math_complex.p2: Olona phawu lubalulekileyo kwimathematika: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Oku kuthetha ukuba isangqa seyunithi kwinqwelomoya entsonkothileyo simiselwe i-engile x.
math_complex.p3: I-exponential entsonkothileyo, i-sine, i-cosine, kunye ne-logarithm zolulelwe kwindiza entsonkothileyo epheleleyo. Uthotho lwabo lweTaylor ludibana everyaphi (okanye kwidiski yelog).
math_complex.p4: Kwi-complex z kunye no-w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Oku kuvumela ii-exponents ezingadibaniyo nezintsonkothileyo, ziveze unxibelelwano olumangalisayo:
math_complex.td4: Isebe leNqununu; engaqhubekiyo kwi-axis yokwenyani engalunganga

math_core.p1: Yonke imisebenzi yetrig ilindele ii-engile kwi-radians. Sebenzisa radians(deg) ukuguqula izidanga.
math_core.td17: I-Tangent = isono/cos. Ayichazwanga ku π/2 + nπ
math_core.td21: Iengile yevektha (x,y) ukusuka kwi-positive x-axis. Uluhlu (−π, π]. Iziphatho x=0.
math_core.td25: Guqula izidanga zibe ziiradians: d × π/180
math_core.td26: Ilog yendalo (isiseko e). ln(e) = 1, ln(1) = 0. Domain x > 0.
math_core.td27: Ilogi yokubini. log₂(1024) = 10. Inani lamasuntswana afunekayo.
math_core.td35: Sinqana ukuya kutsho kuqanda: i-trunc(3.9) = 3, i-trunc(−3.9) = −3
math_core.td39: Yinyani ukuba |a−b| < eps (ehlala ikho 1e-9). Ikhuselekile float uthelekiso.

math_linalg.p1: I-vector luluhlu olucwangcisiweyo lwamanani. Inokumela inqaku esithubeni, isalathiso, isantya, okanye uphawu ku-ML.
math_linalg.p2: I-matrix yi-2D uluhlu lwamanani. I-m×n matrix inemiqolo eyi-m kunye neekholamu zika-n. Matrix imisebenzi yenza undoqo woguqulo lomda.
math_linalg.td1: Imveliso yamachaphaza: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. Isiphumo sisikala. ichaphaza(a,b) = |a||b|cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix ukuphindaphinda (A ngu m×k, B ngu k×n → isiphumo m×n)
math_linalg.td12: Tshintsha imiqolo kunye neekholamu: Aᵀ[i][j] = A[j][i]
math_linalg.td14: Uguqulo lwematriksi A⁻¹ kangangokuba A·A⁻¹ = Mna (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td19: Sombulula inkqubo yomgama iAx = b ngokusebenzisa iGaussian ukupheliswa
math_linalg.td2: Imveliso enqamlezileyo yeevektha ezimbini ze-3D. Isiphumo ⊥ omabini amagalelo. |a×b| = |a||b|isono θ
math_linalg.td4: Ivektha yeyunithi: v / |v|. Ubude buba yi-1.

math_numth.cc4: Goldbach conjecture checker: every even n>2 sisimbuku seeprimes ezimbini
math_numth.td1: Esona sihluli siqhelekileyo nge-algorithm ye-Euclidean. gcd(12,8)=4
math_numth.td19: Amanani adibanisayo ohlobo lwesibini: izahlulelo ze-n zibe k iiseti ezingenanto
math_numth.td21: Amanani eCatalan: ulandelelwano lwesibiyeli, imithi yokubini
math_numth.td3: Zonke izahluli ezilungileyo ze-n, zihleliwe. izahluli(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ(n): ubalo lwamanani apheleleyo kwi [1,n] coprime ukuya ku-n
math_numth.td5: Uguqulo lwemodyuli: x ngolo hlobo a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). Isetyenziswa kwi RSA.
math_numth.td6: Ukwandiswa kwemodyuli ngokukhawuleza: isiseko^exp mod. O(log exp).
math_numth.td8: Zonke iiprimes ukuya ku n nge Sieve of Eratosthenes

math_special.cc3: I-Apéry's constant: ζ(3) ayinangqondo kodwa akukho ndlela ivaliweyo eyaziwayo
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): i-oscillates kunye nokubola - ichaza amaza e-radial
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): iyahlukana ku-x=0, i-oscillates ku-x enkulu
math_special.cc6: I-Ai ibola kakhulu ku-x→+∞, i-oscillates ku-x→-∞
math_special.p1: Umsebenzi we-Gamma Γ(n) kukwenziwa ngokubanzi ngokubanzi kwe-factorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! kwii-positive integers. Yandisa i-factorial ukuya kumanani okwenene kunye nanzima.
math_special.p2: Umsebenzi wemposiso u-erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt sisidibanisi se-Gaussian. Inxulumene ngokuthe ngqo nesiqhelo CDF kwaye ibonakala kwiequation zobushushu kunye nethiyori enokwenzeka.
math_special.p3: ζ(ii) = Σ 1/nˢ ye-n=1,2,3,… (xa i-Re(izi)>1). Iqhagamshela ukusasazwa okuphambili ngemveliso ye-Euler. I-Riemann Hypothesis (engekasonjululwa!) ixhalabisa ooziro be-ζ kwinqwelomoya entsonkothileyo.
math_special.p4: Imisebenzi ye-Bessel u-Jₙ(x) kunye no-Yₙ(x) zizisombululo kwinxaki yokwahlula kuka-Bessel: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Zivela kukusasazwa kwamaza, ukuqhuba kobushushu kwiisilinda, kunye ne-quantum mechanics.
math_special.p5: U-Ai(x) kunye no-Bi(x) zizizisombululo ku-y'' = xy. Zivela kwi-quantum tunneling (WKB uqikelelo) kunye ne-optics (i-diffraction).
math_special.p6: Ezi ntsapho ze-polynomial zivela njenge-eigenfunctions yabaqhubi ababalulekileyo kwaye zisetyenziswa kwiindlela ze-spectral, i-quadrature, kunye ne-quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: U-K(k) kunye no-E(k) zizidibaniselwano ezipheleleyo ezielliptic zodidi lokuqala nolwesibini. Babala ixesha le-pendulum engekho mgca kunye nomjikelezo we-ellipse.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): i-orthogonal kwi- [−1,1]. Inxalenye ye-angular ye-hydrogen wavefunctions.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): i-orthogonal w.r.t. e^(−x²). I-quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td7: Tₙ(x) = cos(n·acos(x)): uqikelelo lwepolynomial olulolona qingqo.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): i-orthogonal kwi- [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x). Imisebenzi ye-Hydrogen radial wave.

math_stats.cc2: Leliphi iqhezu labantu elifumana amanqaku angaphantsi kwama-600 ku-SAT (μ=500, σ=100)?
math_stats.cc3: Ukubakho kweentloko ezi-3 ngqo kwi-10 fair coin flips
math_stats.cc4: I-avareji yabathengi aba-2/umzuzu, amathuba okuba kanye kanye 5 ngomzuzu?
math_stats.li1: r = 1: ubudlelwane obuhle obugqibeleleyo (njengoko u-X ekhula, u-Y ukhula ngokomlinganiselo)
math_stats.p1: Ukunikezelwa koluhlu lwamanani, le misebenzi ishwankathela utyekelo olusembindini wedatha kunye nokusasazeka:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μₓ)(Y−μᵧ)] ilinganisa ukuba ngaba iinguqu ezimbini ziyahamba kunye. Unxulumano r = cov(X,Y)/(σₓ·σᵧ) iyenza iqheleke le nto ukuya ku- [-1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) ilingana nowona mgca ungcono y = a + bx ngokusebenzisa amanqaku edatha usebenzisa izikwere eziqhelekileyo ezincinci. Ibuyisela [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) yonikezelo oluqhelekileyo. Isebenzisa uqikelelo lwesiza.
math_stats.td15: Isampulu esuka ku-N(μ,σ) usebenzisa i-Box-Muller yokuguqula
math_stats.td3: Ixabiso eliphakathi xa lihlelwa. Kuba nkqu n, umndilili wamaxabiso amabini aphakathi.
math_stats.td5: Umndilili wotembuko oluphindwe kabini ukusuka kwintsingiselo: Σ(xᵢ−μ)²/n
math_stats.td8: Lungiselela ukuya kuqanda umahluko weyunithi yentsingiselo: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

math_transforms.cc1: Hlanganisa umqondiso: isixa se-440Hz kunye ne-880Hz amaza anesine
math_transforms.cc10: Fumana eyona frequency kwidatha enikezelwe ngumsebenzisi
math_transforms.cc11: Isihluzi sendlela esezantsi: iqanda ngaphandle kwemigqomo yefrikhwensi ephezulu
math_transforms.cc2: (umlinganiselo wesampuli = iisampulu ze-8 zedemo, ukusetyenziswa kwangempela kuya kuba yi-44100)
math_transforms.cc6: I-Convolution: sebenzisa ibhokisi yokucoca (i-avareji ehambayo) kwidatha egudileyo
math_transforms.cc8: Uhambo olubuyayo: fft → ifft kufuneka iphinde iphinde ibuye
math_transforms.li3: I-FFT ibala iziphumo ezifanayo DFT kodwa ku-O(n log n) vs O(n²) — ye-n=1024 yimisebenzi eyi-1024 vs 1 yesigidi
math_transforms.p1: Ukunika ulandelelwano lweesampulu ze-N x[0], x[1], ..., x[N-1], iDiscrete Fourier Transform ivelisa i-N complex frequency components X[k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 kunye AAC ucinezelo lomsindo, JPEG ucinezelo lomfanekiso, ukuhanjiswa kwe-wireless kwe-5G, ukusetyenzwa kophawu lwerada, kunye MRI ukuphinda kubonwe umfanekisostructon zonke zixhomekeke kwi-FFT algorithm. Ukuyiqonda kukunika ukuqonda kwichunk enkulu yetekhnoloji yanamhlanje.
math_transforms.td1: Utshintsho olukhawulezayo lweFourier (Cooley-Tukey). xs: uluhlu lwee-floats okanye intsonkothile. Ibuyisela uluhlu lwezinto ezinzima. Eyona nto ingcono kwi-N = amandla e-2.
math_transforms.td2: Inverse FFT. Reconstructs isiginali yexesha lesizinda ukusuka kwispectrum.
math_transforms.td3: Naive O(n²) DFT. Iziphumo ezifanayo njenge-ftt, isebenza kuyo nayiphi na i-N.
math_transforms.td4: Ukuguqulwa: (a★b)[n] = Σₖ a[k]·b[n−k]. Isetyenziswa FIR kwizihluzi.
math_transforms.td5: Vavanya iLaplace inguqu yepolynomial kwi-complex s

operators.p4: Sebenzisa izibiyeli ukubhala ngaphezulu: (a + b) * c.

pipe.cc2: Nge pipe — ifundeka ukusuka ekhohlo ukuya ekunene:
pipe.cc3: Ilingana ne: trim(unobumba omncinci(" HELLO WORLD "))
pipe.cc7: buyisela (umtya, ukusuka, ukuya) — umtya piped ngaphakathi
pipe.p1: Xa umsebenzi ufuna ngaphezu kwengxoxo enye, ixabiso piped libe ngu-first ingxoxo kwaye ezinye zihamba kwizibiyeli:
pipe.p2: Ngaphandle kwe-pipe - iifowuni ezifakwe kwindlwane, funda ngaphakathi-ngaphandle:

quickstart.li1: on /start { ... } — ichaza isibambi esisebenza xa umsebenzisi ethumela /start
quickstart.p1: Yenza ifayile entsha ebizwa main.grav kwaye ubhale:
quickstart.p2: Kwi Gravitix IDE, cofa i Baleka ▶ iqhosha kwibar ephezulu. Ngenisa Vortex uMqondiso weBot xa ucelwa. I-bot iqala ngokukhawuleza - akukho nyathelo lokwakha elifunekayo.
quickstart.p3: Iprojekthi ye-Gravitix luluhlu olunye oluqulathe .grav iifayile. Indawo yokungena isoloko ifayile okhetha ukuyiqhuba.
quickstart.p4: state { ... } ibhengeza iinguqu ezizingisileyo ezisinda kuyo yonke imiyalezo. Oku sikugubungela nzulu kwicandelo State Management.

schedule.p1: Amaxesha ku at aku UTC. Ukuba abasebenzisi bakho bakwizowuni yexesha elahlukileyo, hlengahlengisa ngokufanelekileyo (umzekelo, UTC+3 abasebenzisi: sebenzisa "06:00" ku-9 AM yendawo).

state.p1: Sebenzisa ibhlokhi state { } kwinqanaba eliphezulu lefayile yakho:
state.p2: Umhlaba ngamnye unegama, udidi, kunye nexabiso elingagqibekanga (elisetyenziswa xa ibhot iqala kuqala).
state.p3: State amaxabiso ayasinda phakathi kwemiyalezo naphakathi kokuqaliswa kwakhona kwebhot. Zigcinwa kwidiski ngokuzenzekelayo.
state.p5: Iimephu eziku state zifanelekile kumsebenzisi ngamnye:

strings.cc17: Indlela yokudibanisa ifundeka ngokwendalo ukusuka ekhohlo ukuya ekunene:
strings.p2: Nxulumanisa nayiphi na intetho ngaphakathi {} ngaphakathi komtya:
strings.p3: Ungabeka nayiphi na intetho esebenzayo ngaphakathi { } — iifowuni zokusebenza, izibalo, uthelekiso. Akukho mda kubunzima.
strings.p4: Sebenzisa izicaphulo eziphindwe kathathu """...""" kuluhlu lwamagama olunemigca emininzi:
strings.p5: Imitya ecatshulwe kathathu igcina yonke isithuba esimhlophe kunye nemigca emitsha kanye njengoko kubhaliwe. Utoliko {} usebenza ngaphakathi kubo ngendlela efanayo.
strings.p6: Ungabiza imisebenzi emininzi usebenzisa inqaku lechaphaza - zombini izimbo ziyalingana:

structs.p1: Sebenzisa u-impl TypeName { ... } ukuncamathisela iindlela ku-struct. Ngaphakathi kwendlela, self ibhekisa kumzekelo.
structs.p2: Enums chaza udidi olunokuba luphawu lweentlobo ezininzi. Izahluko zingacacanga (njengezigxina) okanye zithwale idatha.

syntax.li1: on <trigger> — khetha ukuba sesiphi isiganeko esitshisa isibambi
syntax.li2: emit <value> — thumela umyalezo; ixabiso ngumtya, umahluko, okanye nayiphi na intetho
syntax.li3: Imigca emininzi emit → imiyalezo emininzi eyahlukileyo eya kumsebenzisi
syntax.li4: Abaphathi abaninzi besixhobo esinye → kukhangelwe phezulu ukuya ezantsi, kuqala match impumelelo
syntax.p1: I-trigger ixelela ibhot nini ukuqhuba umzimba wesibambi:
syntax.p2: emit ithumela umyalezo kumsebenzisi. Emva kwayo ubeke ixabiso lokuthumela:
syntax.p3: Nganye emit ithumela umyalezo owahlukileyo. Bafika omnye emva komnye:
syntax.p4: Ungabhala ezininzi on /command abaphathi. Zitshekishwa ngokulandelelana kwazo — owokuqala ophumeleleyo guard uyabaleka. Jonga Guard Amagatya ngeenkcukacha.
syntax.td1: Nawuphi na umyalezo obhaliweyo ongenanto (hayi umyalelo)

types.cc9: State indawo eqala null ide yabelwe
types.p1: I-64-bit epheleleyo esayiniweyo. Ixhasa amaxabiso ukusuka malunga −9.2 × 10¹⁸ ukuya +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Amanye amaxabiso anokungabikho. Iindawo ozikhethelayo ku-ctx (njenge-ctx.username) inokuba null. Soloko ujonga phambi kokuba usebenzise:
types.p11: Ukongeza u-? emva kohlobo oluthile luyiphawule njengo-optional — ixabiso linokuba ngu-null. Yile ndlela iiparamitha zokusebenza kunye state imihlaba echaza "oku kunokubakho okanye kungabikho":
types.p12: Ukuba ixabiso lisenokungasoloko likhona, lichaze T? kwaye soloko ujonga != null phambi kokuba ulisebenzise. Ukufikelela kwindawo ye-null akuyongozi kwibhot — it returns null cwaka.
types.p3: 10 / 3 ngamaxabiso amabini int anika 3 (inqunyulwe). Sebenzisa 10.0 / 3.0 ngeziphumo zedesimali.
types.p5: Umtya wokubhaliweyo we-Unicode. Imitya ngamaxabiso angenakuguqulwa.
types.p6: Ulandelelwano olucwangcisiweyo lwamaxabiso, zonke ziluhlobo olunye T.
types.p7: Ukufikelela kwisalathiso esingaphandle koluhlu (umzekelo, nums[99] xa uluhlu luneziqalelo ezi-5) returns null kunokungqubana nebhot yakho.
types.p8: Ingqokelela yexabiso eliphambili. Izitshixo mazibe luhlobo olunye, amaxabiso kufuneka abe luhlobo olunye.
types.p9: Uhlobo return lwemisebenzi engena return ixabiso. Awufane ubhale void ngokucacileyo — yinto emiselweyo xa kungekho return uhlobo luchaziwe.

variables.li1: Kufuneka kuqalwe ngonobumba okanye ngomgca ngaphantsi: name, _temp
variables.p1: Izinto eziguquguqukayo zokugcina amaxabiso onokuzisebenzisa kwaye uwatshintshe kuyo yonke inkqubo yakho.
variables.p3: Umqokeleli ungenisa uhlobo olusuka kwixabiso kwicala lasekunene. Awusoze ufune ukubhala uhlobo ngokucacileyo - kodwa wena can.
variables.p5: Izichasiselo azikhethwanga — zisebenzise xa uhlobo lungabonakali kwixabiso, okanye xa ufuna ikhowudi ibe self-ukubhalwa.
variables.p6: Izinto eziguquguqukayo zitshintsheka ngokungagqibekanga. Yabela ixabiso elitsha nge =:
variables.p8: Izinto eziguquguqukayo zikhona ngaphakathi kwebhloko { } zibhengezwe ngaphakathi. Azibonakali ngaphandle kwaloo bhloko:

wizard.title: Ukuseta iNode
wizard.nodeDesc: Seta igama lesixhobo kunye nezibuko. Le datha iya kubonakala kwezinye iindawo kwinethiwekhi yendawo.
wizard.networkDesc: Khetha indlela i-node yakho eya kusebenza ngayo.
wizard.netLocalDesc: Wi-Fi / LAN. Isebenza ngaphandle kwe-intanethi. Izixhobo zifumanana ngokuzenzekelayo.
wizard.netGlobalDesc: Nge-intanethi. Cloudflare Itonela + ukunyanzeliswa kwetrafikhi. Ukufikelela naphi na emhlabeni.
wizard.cfInstalled: cloudflared efakiweyo — itonela iya kuqalisa ngokuzenzekelayo
wizard.cfNotFound: cloudflared ayifunyenwanga. Yifake ukuze uvule imo yehlabathi.
wizard.sslDesc: Khetha indlela yokufumana isatifikethi HTTPS. Icetyiselwe ukusebenza ngokupheleleyo kwesikhangeli (i-microphone, ikhamera, WebRTC).
wizard.sslSelfDesc: Yenziwe ngokuzenzekelayo, isebenza LAN ngaphandle kwe-intanethi
wizard.sslLeDesc: Isiqinisekiso esithembekileyo sasimahla. Ifuna i-domain kunye ne-port 80.
wizard.sslNoneDesc: HTTP kuphela. Ezinye iifitsha zebhrawuza zinokungafumaneki.
wizard.adminPasswordHint: Ifunelwa CA ukufakwa kwi-system trust store. Igama lokugqithisa lisetyenziswa kube kanye kwaye aligcinwa.
wizard.mkcertInfo: mkcert yenza izatifikethi ezithembekileyo zasekhaya ngaphandle kwezilumkiso zebrawuza. Isimahla, isebenza ngaphandle kwe-intanethi.
wizard.domainHint: Indawo kufuneka yalathe kule seva IP
wizard.stagingHint: Ayisebenzisi LE imida yokulinganisa, isatifikethi asiyi kuthenjwa
wizard.noSslWarning: Ngaphandle kwe-HTTPS: imakrofoni/ikhamera yeefowuni, izaziso, i-geolocation ayiyi kufumaneka. Ezinye izikhangeli zibhloka WebSocket ngaphandle SSL.
wizard.authDesc: Qwalasela iindlela zokungena kubasebenzisi bendawo yakho. Ungatsiba oku kwaye wongeze kamva kwiisetingi.
wizard.passkeysDesc: Ngena usebenzisa ibhayometriki, Chukumisa ID okanye PIN. Akukho nkonzo zangaphandle ezifunekayo — isebenza ngesikhangeli/OS.
wizard.reviewDesc: Yonke into ibonakala ilungile? Izicwangciso ziya kugcinwa kwifayile ye.env emva kokusungulwa.
wizard.launchedDesc: Ukuseta iwizadi kugqityiwe. Ivula ujongano oluphambili...
wizard.enterAdminPassword: Ngenisa igama eliyimfihlo lomlawuli ukulihlohla CA
wizard.caInstalled: CA efakwe kwi-system trust store — qala ngokutsha isikhangeli sakho

onboarding.step1Text: Cofa apha ukwenza igumbi elitsha lengxoxo
onboarding.step3Text: Chwetheza umyalezo wakho wokuqala kwaye ucofe u-Enter
onboarding.step4Text: Yonke imiyalezo inoguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo — nguwe kuphela kunye nomamkeli onokuyifunda
onboarding.step5Text: Phonononga Vortex — yenza amagumbi, yongeza abafowunelwa, lungisa useto

permissions.customHint: Susa iimvume ezimiselweyo zelilungu. Ezi ziyasebenza kungakhathaliseki indima yazo.
permissions.canSendStickersDesc: Ungathumela izincamathelisi, ii-GIFs, kunye neepakethi ze-emoji
permissions.canChangeInfoDesc: Unokutshintsha igama legumbi, inkcazo, kunye ne-avatar
permissions.canManageCallsDesc: Ingaqala, iphele, kwaye ilawule iifowuni zeqela
